summary: Comprehensive testing of Bull & Bear trading education app. All core features working correctly including Book section PDF functionality (Read Online and Download), Trading Courses, Signals, AI Advisor, Admin Panel, and Authentication.
critical_code_review_comments: Courses don't have video URLs set - admin needs to upload and link videos to courses
News section is empty (0 news articles) - admin needs to add news content
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features working. PDF Read Online opens correct URL in new tab. Download endpoint returns PDF with proper headers. AI Advisor chat works. Admin panel all tabs functional.

book_section.download: WORKING - Returns PDF with Content-Disposition: attachment; filename=Game-of-Candles-UPDATED.pdf
book_section.access_control: WORKING - pdf_url hidden for non-authenticated users

courses.video_playback: NOT TESTED - No videos linked to courses yet

signals.page_loads: WORKING - Shows 3 signals with entry/exit prices

ai_advisor.ui_elements: WORKING - Input field, send button, suggestion buttons visible

admin_panel.dashboard: WORKING - Shows stats (4 users, 5 courses, 3 signals, 3 purchases)
admin_panel.users_tab: WORKING - Shows 4 users with access permissions
